defaultQuery: (hiring OR "we are hiring" OR collab OR "build with me") (react OR typescript OR rust OR ai) lang:en -is:retweet
defaultCvSummary:
PROFILE
Peramanathan Sathyamoorthy — Senior Software Engineer (9+ years). Swedish citizen. TypeScript/React/Rust; platform and frontend leadership; agentic desktop (Tauri, MVU, MCP). MSc Computer Science (Uppsala) + MSc Operations Research (NIT Trichy). Stockholm work history; remote/hybrid; selective relocation for high-impact AI/platform roles. Open: staff/senior IC in platform engineering, agent infrastructure, observability/reliability, AI tooling, technical cofounder collabs. GitHub: p10ns11y · Portfolio: peramanathan-sathyamoorthy-cv.vercel.app

EDUCATION
MSc Computer Science, Uppsala University (2010–2016). MSc Operations Research & Computer Applications, NIT Tiruchirappalli (2007–2009). BSc Mathematics, Bharathidasan University (2004–2007). Languages: English (proficient), Swedish (basic).

ONEFLOW AB — digital signature & contract management, Stockholm (Apr 2017 – Dec 2024)
Senior Software Engineer (Jan 2023 – Dec 2024): integrated TypeScript into legacy FlowType/JavaScript mix → 70% reduction in type-related errors; Zod inference for business data; automated JS→TypeScript migration preserving VCS history (~200 hours saved); unified distributed ACL permissions (owner/guest contexts) into one utility module.
Engineering Team Lead (Oct 2021 – Dec 2022): co-led JSON rich-text editor with legacy HTML integration (+60% user satisfaction); mentored team to self-organizing model; hiring/onboarding; Playwright E2E transformation (mob-test prototype → full suite rewrite); lightweight Zod validation library.
Full Stack Integration Engineer (Mar 2019 – Sep 2021): established Integration Team; Python/React multi-client apps (HubSpot, SuperOffice, Microsoft Dynamics, Salesforce, Teamtailor); stabilized Public API for third-party ecosystem; frontend reviews for Dynamics/Salesforce.
JavaScript Developer (Apr 2017 – Feb 2019): React Router in Backbone.js IAM; CI build time −40%; React modernization.
Stack: TypeScript, React, Python, Playwright, Zod, Jest, Webpack, Node/Express, Flask, MySQL, Connexion, CRM integrations.

EARLIER ROLES
Weavler AB (Jan 2016 – Mar 2017): full-stack accessible e-commerce artisans platform (1.6M SEK PTS grant); AWS infrastructure −40% costs; Mandrill, Slack bots, PayPal; SSR/SEO; WCAG accessibility; OSS Babel i18n plugin; MongoDB.
Bumbee Labs AB intern (Jul–Sep 2015): MongoDB aggregation/map-reduce on millions of samples; AngularJS/Python KPI dashboard; stack migration exploration (React, Eve).

PUBLIC PROJECTS (featured OSS — see github.com/p10ns11y)
devprofile | TypeScript, Next.js 16 | Live portfolio with AI Q&A, interactive docs, automated PDF CV; xAI/fusion-style agent patterns. https://peramanathan-sathyamoorthy-cv.vercel.app
collab-finder | Tauri, Rust, React, TypeScript | Personal agentic dashboard: X API + xAI for jobs/collabs/side hustles; guarded autonomous reactor, MCP, CV sidecars, cover letters, research packs.
thepulimaangani | Rust, WASM, React, TanStack | Tamil classical grammar & poem prosody segmenter. https://seiyul-alagi.vercel.app
arch-machine | Shell, Arch Linux | Profile-based AI/ML-ready workstation installer: security audits, self-healing, agent-oriented dev environment.
premflow | C CLI (thecuriousts/premflow) | Notes, tasks, pomodoro, daily journal, search, stats — distraction-free terminal workflow.
elomaxz | C, MVU | Hybrid Model-View-Update framework for systems programming: Elm-like Cmd/Effect, composition, testability.
prototype-it-to-explain-itself | Python, PyTorch | Minimal runnable LLM education: char-level LSTM (~150k params), next-token sampling, minimal trainable ReAct agent. Cloudflare Workers deploy.
agent-prompt-tuning-lab | JavaScript | Privacy-first Cursor transcript harvest → prompt-tuning datasets, skills, rules, gold exemplars for LLM agents.
skills | Shell | Curated Agent Skills library: orchestration, fusion/fission optimization, security, concurrent multi-agent development.
selfie-sign-in-flow-using-v0-xAI | TypeScript, XState | Face-auth POC: multi-angle AWS Rekognition enrollment + login; complex state-machine UX.

OTHER NOTABLE BUILD
Adaptate — dynamic model validator using Zod, interoperable with OpenAPI (from CV portfolio projects).
babel-plugin-react-intl-messages-generator — Babel AST plugin for react-intl translation extraction at scale (OSS).

RESEARCH & PUBLICATIONS
Thesis: Energy Efficiency as Orchestration Service — participatory sensing, context-aware policies, intelligent cloud orchestration for resource-constrained/mobile IoT (relevant to on-device agents, reliability, efficient infra).
IEEE CloudCom 2015 — Energy Efficiency as Orchestration Service for Mobile IoT.
Wireless Communications and Mobile Computing (2017) — Profiling energy efficiency and data communications for mobile IoT.

TECH (selected breadth)
Product: system thinking, proactive problem prevention, detail orientation, innovative adjacent thinking, mentoring and team leadership. Engineering: Agile, TDD, BDD, E2E testing, mob/pair programming, architectural design, integration platform building.
Languages: TypeScript/JavaScript, Python, Rust, C, C++, Java, R, Erlang/Elixir. Frontend: React, Next.js, Remix, Astro, Solid-start, Playwright, Esbuild, Vite, Webpack. Backend/API: Flask, Django, Eve, Node/Express, Connexion. Data: MySQL, Postgres, MongoDB; NumPy/Pandas/scikit-learn. Deploy: AWS (EC2/S3/IAM/ELB), Vercel, Fly.io, Heroku, Netlify. AI/ML: LangChain/agents, PyTorch, xAI API, prompt engineering, dataset/skill extraction from agent transcripts. Workflow: Graphite stacking; accessibility (WCAG), SEO, KPI dashboards.

RECENT LEARNING
Cilium AI/ML Security; HashiCorp Terraform Associate (O'Reilly live); LangChain Chat with Your Data; Build LLM Apps with LangChain.js.

DIFFERENTIATORS
Official X agent resources in production workflows; self-guarded autonomous tooling with cost/fit/CV-mutation gates; high-signal OSS shipped in public with minimal hype; educator and team-builder.

presets.label: SpaceXAI careers
presets.query: from:xaicareers (hiring OR engineer OR careers OR inference OR RL) lang:en -is:retweet has:links
presets.rationale: Official @xaicareers posts (SpaceXAI division; legacy xAI handle). Highest alignment target.

presets.label: SpaceXAI keywords
presets.query: (SpaceXAI OR "xAI" OR Grok) (hiring OR engineer OR SpaceX) lang:en -is:retweet has:links
presets.rationale: SpaceXAI hiring posts on X; keep xAI/Grok terms — people still use legacy names in posts.

presets.label: Stockholm AI
presets.query: ("AI Engineer" OR "Senior Software Engineer" OR "Rust Developer") (Stockholm OR Sweden) (hiring OR jobb OR rekryterar) lang:en -is:retweet place_country:SE
presets.rationale: Sweden citizen; family anchor market for AI/Rust senior roles.

presets.label: Senior jobs
presets.query: (hiring OR "open role" OR "we're hiring") (senior OR staff OR lead) (react OR typescript OR rust) lang:en -is:retweet has:links
presets.rationale: Core stack + seniority + posts with links.

presets.label: Remote AI/agent
presets.query: (hiring OR careers) (remote OR distributed) ("AI engineer" OR "agent" OR LLM OR inference) lang:en -is:retweet has:links

presets.label: Cofounder collab
presets.query: (collab OR cofounder OR "co-founder" OR "build with me") (rust OR typescript OR "AI agent") lang:en -is:retweet
presets.rationale: Convertible builder partnerships, not formal HR posts.

presets.label: Bounty / freelance
presets.query: ("looking for" OR bounty OR freelance OR "need help") ("Rust developer" OR "AI agent" OR "local LLM") lang:en -is:retweet
presets.rationale: Side income and short engagements aligned with agent/Rust skills.

presets.label: Agent infra
presets.query: ("AI agent" OR agentic OR "agent infrastructure" OR MCP) (hiring OR builder OR ship OR collab) lang:en -is:retweet
presets.rationale: Agentic tooling ecosystem matches public projects and thesis.

presets.label: Energy / local-first
presets.query: ("energy efficient" OR "local-first" OR on-device OR edge) (AI OR LLM OR agent) (hiring OR engineer OR collab) lang:en -is:retweet
presets.rationale: Thesis-aligned positioning (2016 orchestration → today's edge AI).

presets.label: Tesla Energy
presets.query: (Tesla OR @Tesla) ("Energy Software" OR "Distributed Systems" OR Megapack) (engineer OR hiring OR careers) lang:en -is:retweet has:links
presets.rationale: Energy + distributed systems fit thesis and systems background.

presets.label: Japan (English)
presets.query: ("AI Engineer" OR "Software Engineer") (Tokyo OR Japan) (hiring OR job) (english OR remote OR visa) lang:en -is:retweet has:links
presets.rationale: English-friendly Japan tech hiring (supplement Japan-Dev off-X).

presets.label: Build in public
presets.query: ("build in public" OR "shipping" OR "join me") (community OR together OR indie) lang:en -is:retweet
presets.rationale: Community and indie builder graph for inbound collabs.
